structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-01-17 NOVA LLPA updates
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-01-17 13:22:20-07:00

	
	

 

NOVA LLPA updates
NCM-P-2025-01-17

 

 

ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Based on secondary market execution and servicing performance of NOVA’s pipeline, the following changes are being applied to the NOVA ratesheet.  This change includes larger hits for lower Govt FICO adjusters, but positive adjusters for higher FICO scenarios will also be added.  A summary of changes is included below, and all LLPA’s are listed in the attached excel document.  These changes will be effective for lock requests on or after February 1st, 2025.

 

Conventional Current

	Conventional New

 

 

 

 

 

	 

 

 

 

 

Addl' Features 1

			 

	Addl' Features 1

			 

Temporary Buydown

-0.125

		 

	Temporary Buydown

-0.250
